---
title: "Title of the third paper"
---

\begin{center}
\textbf{Abstract}
\end{center}

\begin{quote}
\itshape
State the question, methods, principal findings, and contribution in 150--250 words.
\end{quote}

## Introduction

## Literature review

## Methodology

## Data

## Results

## Conclusions

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

## Appendices {.unnumbered}

### 4.A Supplementary material {.unnumbered}
